seo.title: Print Infrastructure | Quarterfold Printabilities
seo.description: Three printing facilities and two warehouses across Navi Mumbai. 300,000 sq ft engineered so your books ship on time, every time.

hero.title: Built for Scale. Engineered for Trust.
hero.sub: Three printing facilities and two warehouses across Navi Mumbai. 300,000 sq ft engineered for one thing: books that ship on time.
hero.statAriaLabel: 300,000 square feet engineered across three printing facilities and two warehouses
hero.statFoot: Engineered across three printing facilities in Navi Mumbai

print.label: Print Capacity
print.body: Twenty-two web towers alongside six sheet-fed presses and three Lineomatic lines, engineered for large-volume textbook runs.

bind.label: Binding & Finishing
bind.body: Seventeen folders, ten binding and stitching lines and six automatic thread-sewing machines finish every book to spec.

ware.label: Warehousing & Dispatch
ware.body: Two fulfilment centres run automated collating, kitting and shrink-wrapping, up to 10,000 kits processed every single day.

tower.name: 22-Web Offset Towers
tower.spec: Twenty-two web-offset towers run long textbook forms at full speed, register held tight across every signature.

press.name: Sheet-Fed Fleet, 6 Presses
press.spec: Six sheet-fed presses handle covers, short runs and colour-critical work where finish and fidelity matter most.

book.name: 3 Lineomatic Exercise-Book Lines
book.spec: Three Lineomatic lines rule, fold and stitch exercise books end to end at volume.

carton.name: In-house Corrugated & E-flute Cartons
carton.spec: Cartons are made in-house, so every shipment leaves in packaging built for its load.

results.title: Measured, not estimated.
results.sub: Not a projection. The plant that prints and ships, counted across three printing facilities and two warehouses.

sqft.label: Sq ft engineered
sqft.foot: Across three printing facilities and two warehouses

sites.label: Printing facilities
sites.foot: Plus two warehouses in Navi Mumbai

results.videoPendingLabel: Preview facilities walkthrough, video coming soon

recognition.title: Awarded for the work, year on year.

capexil.name: Highest Book Exporter
capexil.body: CAPEXIL, Government of India, awarded across consecutive years.

printweek.name: PrintWeek Honours
printweek.body: Recognised by PrintWeek for production quality and scale.

dnb.name: Dun & Bradstreet
dnb.body: Listed among India’s leading print and publishing businesses.

cta.title: See it in person or on a call.
cta.sub: Tour the floor, meet the team, and get a quote scoped to your run.
